extensions.name: Básico
extensions.desc: STRIPS-style: visit a minimum number of cities.

extensions.name: Extension 2
extensions.desc: Days per city, minimum trip days, per-city interest + minimize metric.

extensions.name: Extension 3/4

flightDesc2: connects to three cities forming a triangle. Each city has a hotel. Stars = interest value (planner minimizes the sum).
constDesc2: — fly to new city, book hotel, choose stay duration (1–4 days). Requires a numeric PDDL planner (ENHSP, LPG).
mockDesc: Pre-computed optimal plan for the Extension 2 problem above.
